reason: The Layer 2 campaign collected complete attention-tail evidence and ranks fp16_nm1/flat_nomacro first under the latency+energy objective, but the broad-ranking measurement does not isolate a paired architecture win. Use the evidence to define a focused softmax overlap/backpressure follow-up before promoting a hardware or mapper change.
next_action: Create a focused follow-up proposal that stresses softmax scheduling overlap and backpressure against the current fp16_nm1/flat_nomacro reference.
